word: H2559 - חָמַק - châmaq - khaw-mak' - Go about

sections.paragraph:
Original: חמק

Transliteration: châmaq

Phonetic: khaw-mak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to withdraw, turn around, turn away
    1. (Qal) to turn away
    2. (Hithpael) to turn about, vacillate, turn hither and thither

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: TWOT- 682

Part(s) of speech: Verb
